<?php namespace Faker\Provider\zh_CN; class DateTime extends \Faker\Provider\DateTime { public static function amPm($max = 'now') { return static::dateTime($max)->format('a') === 'am' ? '上午' : '下午'; } public static function dayOfWeek($max = 'now') { $map = [ 'Sunday' => '星期日', 'Monday' => '星期一', 'Tuesday' => '星期二', 'Wednesday' => '星期三', 'Thursday' => '星期四', 'Friday' => '星期五', 'Saturday' => '星期六', ]; $week = static::dateTime($max)->format('l'); return $map[$week] ?? $week; } public static function monthName($max = 'now') { $map = [ 'January' => '一月', 'February' => '二月', 'March' => '三月', 'April' => '四月', 'May' => '五月', 'June' => '六月', 'July' => '七月', 'August' => '八月', 'September' => '九月', 'October' => '十月', 'November' => '十一月', 'December' => '十二月', ]; $month = static::dateTime($max)->format('F'); return $map[$month] ?? $month; } }
